claim_boundary: Closure audit and readiness-state synthesis only; not benchmark evidence, not a training or evaluation result, and not a paper-facing claim.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Same-seed baseline, obstacle-only, ego-only, and combined variants are defined.
evidence: PR #1520 added predictive ego feature contract and same-seed config surfaces.
PR #3769 added fail-closed readiness checks for variant completeness, provenance, ego-obstacle conditioning, and same-seed schedule metadata.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Ego-conditioned feature contract documented and preflighted.
evidence: configs/training/predictive/predictive_ego_features_contract_v1.yaml
docs/context/issue_1504_ego_feature_contract.md
tests/benchmark/test_predictive_v2_comparison_readiness.py

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Training and evaluation artifacts are durable with manifests and checksums.
evidence: No gate-cleared four-way training/evaluation campaign exists.
PR #3833 and PR #4459 keep the decision packet no_go unless a future continue gate includes durable evidence/provenance.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Forecast metrics and downstream navigation metrics are reported separately.
evidence: PR #1549 recorded obstacle-feature forecast-vs-closed-loop interpretation boundaries.
No new gate-cleared four-way comparison result exists.
PR #1549 recorded hard-seed success 0.0000 for both baseline and obstacle-feature prerequisite rows.
PR #1901 recorded the local coupling gate with hard and global success 0.0000.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Missing artifacts and fallback/degraded states are explicit stage-gate outcomes.
evidence: PR #3769 added fail-closed readiness stage output.
PR #3833 added no_go decision packet fields.
PR #4459 requires durable evidence/provenance for any continue gate.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: A context note recommends continue, revise, or stop predictive planner v2.
evidence: PR #2287 added docs/context/issue_2275_predictive_v2_fate.md selecting stop_old_predictive_v2_expansion.
PR #2421 classified child issues under that stop/revise decision.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Parent issue has no routine four-way expansion without maintainer-selected revised hypothesis.
evidence: Issue #1490 comments on 2026-06-21 and 2026-07-04 reaffirm blocked/deferred state.
Readiness code fails closed without a provenance-backed continue gate artifact and revised-hypothesis acknowledgement.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Lane explicitly continued, revised, downgraded, or closed.
evidence: Lane is explicitly revised/deferred, not closed.
Remaining blocker is maintainer-selected revised hypothesis plus provenance-backed closed-loop coupling-gate artifact recommending continue, or an explicit maintainer close/downgrade decision.

linked_prs.role: ego feature contract and same-seed config surfaces

residual_blocker: Maintainer-selected revised predictive-v2 hypothesis plus provenance-backed closed-loop coupling-gate artifact recommending continue, or an explicit maintainer close/downgrade decision.
